expectations.text: Phases are annotated with sprint numbers
At least one sprint has 2+ parallel phases
expectations.evidence: Sprint 1 has 2 parallel phases (Shipment API and Event Ingestion with independent dependencies). Sprint 2 has 3 parallel phases (WebSocket, Geofencing, Webhooks). Sprint 3 has 2 parallel phases.

expectations.text: Core CRUD API is available early
expectations.evidence: Phase 1 'Shipment API & Authentication' is Sprint 1, first phase

expectations.text: Event ingestion and ETA engine are separate phases
expectations.evidence: Phase 2 'Event Ingestion Pipeline' (Sprint 1) vs Phase 6 'ETA Computation Engine' (Sprint 3) -- clearly separate

expectations.text: Multi-region deployment is in a later sprint
expectations.evidence: Phase 8 'Multi-Region Deployment' is Sprint 4 -- the last sprint
